summary: CP at exactly 6.00% threshold. 142 forecasters. Underlying event extremely unlikely. Recent news shows continued rhetoric but retreat from action.
content:
Meta-prediction: Will CP be above 6.00% on 2026-02-28 for Greenland sovereignty question?

Current CP: 6.00% (as of 2026-02-16)
Threshold: strictly above 6.00%
Resolution: 2026-02-28 16:49:57
Forecasters: 142

Key news (Feb 2026):
- Danish PM at Munich Security Conference says Trump's desire is "the same" - still very serious about acquiring Greenland
- Article from Feb 13: "Why Trump Retreated from Greenland" - suggesting de-escalation
- Trump reached "framework agreement" with NATO about strategic cooperation, NOT sovereignty
- Greenland called sovereignty claims a "red line"
- France and Canada opened consulates in Greenland to show solidarity

Manifold markets (Feb 2026):
- US acquire Greenland by March 31, 2026: 5%
- USA control Greenland by EOY2026: 6.9%
- Trump/US deal with Denmark in 2026: 5.6%

CP history: UNAVAILABLE (tool error). This is critical missing data.

Status quo: CP at exactly 6.00% → resolves NO (threshold is strictly greater than)
